content.description: Route all artifact reads and writes through the artifact CLI. Added capture-transcript and companion-path commands to artifact.sh; delete staged-transcript now also removes companion JSONL. Updated on_stop.sh and on_pre_compact.sh to use artifact.sh capture-transcript instead of direct filesystem writes. Updated scribe-all.sh to use artifact.sh show/companion-path/delete instead of constructing paths directly. Updated herald.md to use bin/artifact.sh list/show for reading session-docs and bin/artifact.sh store for writing publications; added Bash to herald tool list.
